description: ReachInbox is an AI cold email platform that finds prospects, personalizes campaigns, automates warm-up and follow-ups, and manages replies in a unified inbox.
overview: ReachInbox runs AI cold email outreach end to end, finding prospects, writing personalized campaigns, automating warm-up and follow-ups, and handling replies in one inbox.
what_is: ReachInbox is an AI cold outreach tool that helps teams find prospects, write personalized cold emails, and keep messages out of spam. It combines lead generation, personalization, and deliverability warm-up in one platform.

It is strongest when you need to generate leads, book meetings, and scale outreach without manual effort, since it automates warm-up, personalization, and follow-ups. That suits B2B SaaS founders, startups, and sales teams.

ReachInbox works with any email provider and fits the GTM stack alongside CRMs and enrichment tools via APIs and webhooks. It is focused on cold email and reply management in a unified inbox rather than full CRM or multichannel marketing.
